title: Monitoring Server Performance
breadcrumbs: Deployment Considerations for Performance and Scalability
text: Monitoring Server Performance You can use the Uniface Router Monitor to see how busy servers are and to check for problems. For example, you can check for: Clients in the Wait state. Servers that are never in the Busy state. If servers are use intermittently, look for performance bottlenecks in the client. Application sharing. If every client is getting a shared server, use exclusive servers. Uniface Router response times. Get a feel for normal response times in the Uniface Router dynamic information. If response time is slower than usual, the router might be overloaded. Consider starting a second router. For more information, see Monitoring the Uniface Router . Was this topic helpful?
